title: hieracium prenanthoides subsp. valdefoliatum
intro: Hieracium prenanthoides subsp. valdefoliatum is a subspecies of the Hieracium prenanthoides plant, commonly known as Hawkweed, a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium prenanthoides subsp. valdefoliatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds. Hieracium prenanthoides subsp. valdefoliatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the herbal preparations typically made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
